name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.45: fleet-table behind flag now counts only a healthy, rolling target. A machine on the highest non-halted, non-rejected build reads up to date (green) even if a higher halted/rejected build exists; behind shows only when a publishable healthy build is newer. Rejected-build badge stays as history. Cumulative over v5.44.
